creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
There's stil some on powerpc64le:
root@talos-powerpc64le:/usr/src # find /usr/local/poudriere/jails/powerpc64le-150/usr/lib/clang/15.0.7/lib/freebsd
/usr/local/poudriere/jails/powerpc64le-150/usr/lib/clang/15.0.7/lib/freebsd
/usr/local/poudriere/jails/powerpc64le-150/usr/lib/clang/15.0.7/lib/freebsd/libclang_rt.xray-basic-powerpc64le.a
/usr/local/poudriere/jails/powerpc64le-150/usr/lib/clang/15.0.7/lib/freebsd/libclang_rt.xray-powerpc64le.a
/usr/local/poudriere/jails/powerpc64le-150/usr/lib/clang/15.0.7/lib/freebsd/libclang_rt.xray-fdr-powerpc64le.a
/usr/local/poudriere/jails/powerpc64le-150/usr/lib/clang/15.0.7/lib/freebsd/libclang_rt.xray-profiling-powerpc64le.a

xray is enabled on powerpc64le, but not on powerpc64, which is probably why you missed it.
